Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3 	Session 4 	Session 5 	Session 6
In this training, Teresa is going to walk you step by step through a checklist of event logistics you should have prepared the week leading up to your
event or even sooner. This includes things like meals and beverages, audio video, housekeeping, layout and any materials needed to make sure your
event goes off without a hitch.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Have a plan for any meals and beverages you want at your event.
Make sure you can meet any dietary allergies.
Have an AV team ready ﴾if needed﴿ that can handle video, photos, microphones, projector, etc. ﴾Optional﴿
Have someone or a team ready for housekeeping after the event. This includes cleaning and re stocking anything needed for next session
or next day.
Make sure you have the right layout for your event ready.
Make a list and print all the materials you want at your event.
